title: guilielma gasipaes var. coccinea
intro: Guilielma gasipaes var. coccinea, also known as the red guianese guava, is a variant of the Guianese guava plant, a species of flowering plant native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of antioxidants and polyphenols. The plant's extracts have shown potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off cancer cells, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. The herbal preparations of Guilielma gasipaes var. coccinea include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
